action_text: Click the list search magnifier to apply the search
rationale: Execute the current targeted search for the likely report title “Incidents by Assigned To” in the Global reports list

action_text: Press Enter in the list search field to execute the search
rationale: If clicking the icon doesn’t trigger, pressing Enter in the list search field will run the same search filter

action_text: Type "Incidents by" into the list search field
rationale: Broaden the query to surface related reports if the exact title isn’t present

action_text: Type "Assigned to" into the list search field
rationale: Search by the key field name to find any report counting incidents by assignee even if the title differs

action_text: Type "Incidents by Assignee" into the list search field
rationale: Try a common alternate naming (“Assignee”) to locate the report showing incidents per agent
